clips.title: These 2 random golfers think they can beat us...
clips.description:
These 2 random golfers think they can beat us...

Hilarious reactions to a terrible shot

Bryson DeChambeau — major champion bringing his viral 'Break 50' challenges and big-swing experiments to YouTube.

Clip from “Bryson DeChambeau” ▶ Full video on their channel.

clips.title: Our Latest Drinking Challenge Got Out Of Hand!
clips.description:
Our Latest Drinking Challenge Got Out Of Hand!

Bob and Lee's drinking challenge takes a turn for the worse.

Bob Does Sports is the comedy-golf crew (Bobby, Fat Perez & co.) known for big-personality scrambles, trick shots and on-course antics.
